mapper.sql: A.NREQUEST_AS_HIST_SEQ, A.NREQUEST_AS_SEQ, A.SREQUEST_AS_CTM , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM1, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM1, A.DREQUEST_AS_OBJ_OPEN_DT1, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_IP_BLOCK1 , A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_NM2, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_LLNUM2, A.DREQUEST_AS_OBJ_OPEN_DT2, A.SREQUEST_AS_OBJ_IP_BLOCK2 , A.SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD, A.SAS_TPIC_NM, A.SAS_TPIC_ORG, A.SEXIST_SP_LINE , A.NEXIST_SALES, A.SALT_SP_LINE, A.NALT_SALES, A.DAPV_DT , A.SAPVUSER_ID, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
, B.SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_NM AS SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_NM , C.SUSER_NM AS SCREATE_NM , C.SUSER_NM AS SMODIFY_NM
AND A.SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD = B.SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SCREATE_ID = C.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SMODIFY_ID = C.SUSER_ID(+)
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_HIST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_HIST A
